execution_summary: I generated a Dockerfile, built the image, started the container, and executed the analysis script replication_analysis__py.py after human approval. The script loaded the SPSS file SCORE_all data.sav, processed the data, computed summary statistics (means, SDs, counts) for confidence (CONF_*) and response time (RT_*) measures across the two experimental conditions, and saved outputs to /app/data/replication_summary.csv and /app/data/replication_processed_data.csv. The analysis completed with exit code 0. The run produced PerformanceWarnings about DataFrame fragmentation (from pandas) and several RuntimeWarnings from pingouin (invalid/divide-by-zero operations) but no fatal exceptions. Overall the run succeeded and produced the summary and processed data files; no regression coefficients from the original paper were reproduced here because the provided analysis computes descriptive summaries and some t-statistics were not available (NaN) in the summary output.

code_executed.logs:
stdout: Loading data from: /app/data/SCORE_all data.sav
Condition unique values: [2. 1.]
Saved replication summary to /app/data/replication_summary.csv
Saved processed data to /app/data/replication_processed_data.csv
Analysis completed.

stderr/warnings: Repeated PerformanceWarning: DataFrame is highly fragmented (many frame.insert calls). Several RuntimeWarning messages from pingouin (invalid value encountered in scalar divide; divide by zero) indicating some tests produced NaN or unstable statistics.
code_executed.environment: Docker image based on python:3.10-slim with pandas>=1.3.0, numpy>=1.21.0, scipy, statsmodels>=0.13.0, pyreadstat, pingouin, openpyxl (as specified in generated Dockerfile).

results.hypothesis_tested: Between-subjects effect of Condition (two levels) on metacognitive confidence and response-time measures (e.g., CONF_PMD, CONF_NMD, CONF_CMD and RT_PMD, RT_NMD, RT_CMD). In short: the preregistered focal test assesses whether condition membership affects confidence and response times.

findings_summary.outcome_name: CONF_PMD (Mean confidence for PMD items, condition 1 vs 2)
findings_summary.direction: Difference is essentially null/slightly positive (condition 2 > condition 1 by ~0.007)

findings_summary.outcome_name: RT_PMD (Response time for PMD items, condition 1 vs 2)
findings_summary.value: Mean(cond1)=492.30 ms; Mean(cond2)=504.46 ms; Mean difference (cond2-cond1)=~12.16 ms
findings_summary.direction: Positive (condition 2 slower than condition 1 by ~12 ms), but small

tables.table_id: Replication summary (not an original paper table reference)
tables.table_description: Summary statistics (means, std, counts) for outcomes by condition as computed by the replication script.
The processed data frame used by the analysis script (cleaned/recoded variables).

figures.figure_description: No figures were saved as artifacts by the executed script.
